chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1031 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA 4276/25 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on CMA 4277/25 4. For hearing of main case. 08-07-2025 Mansoor Ali Khoso, the petitioner present in person. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. By way of this petition, the petitioner has prayed for the following relief: “That this Honourable court may kindly be pleased to issue the writ of Mandamus against the Respondents No.1&2 by directing them to pass an appropriate order and finalize the Disciplinary proceedings under the Sindh Civil Servants (E&D) Rules 1973 against the Respondent No.04 as per Law”. Petitioner argued that he had made complaint against respondents No.3&4 and such enquiry was finalized by the concerned authority(ies); however, no action has been taken despite approaches made by him to the concerned. The petitioner by sending simple applications to the competent authorities has shifted his burden to the Court without approaching them properly. As far averments made in the petition are concerned, same are required to be adjudicated and established after recording evidence, for which this Court being barred by Article 212 of the 2 Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, is not in a position to entertain this petition. Hence, this petition being devoid of any merit is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed applications with no orders as to costs. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application / complaint before the proper forum, if so advised.

Hence, this petition being devoid of any merit is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed applications with no orders as to costs. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application / complaint before the proper forum, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
